title: justicia kuntzei subsp. kuntzei
intro: Justicia kuntzei subsp. kuntzei, also known as the Brazilian plume poppy or Justicia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Justicia kuntzei subsp. kuntzei typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams for various health applications.
